action: stage GRDI, reproject to equal-area grid, compute region and lead-case summaries

fallback: fall back to SHDI if raster alignment is weak

success_criterion: SHDI is defensible as contextual vulnerability evidence

action: add layer only if it improves the decision-facing matrix
success_criterion: layer is reproducible and honestly labeled
